case_title: SIMONS, PETER DBA RAINBOW TOURS VS SUNLINE EXPRESS et al

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMONS, PETER DBA RAINBOW TOURS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUNLINE EXPRESS STALLBAUMER, MICHAEL : IND'L STALLBAUMER, MICHAEL DBA SUNLINE EXPRESS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00, $2416. ECONOMIC (ACTUAL) DAMAGES, BAL ARE PUNITIVE DAMAGES. CT FOUND THAT DEFT INTENTIONALY OBTAINED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SIMONS, PETER DBA RAINBOW TOURS AS TO DEFENDANT SUNLINE EXPRESS STALLBAUMER, MICHAEL : IND'L STALLBAUMER, MICHAEL DBA SUNLINE EXPRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STALLBAUMER, MICHAEL DBA SUNLINE EXPRESS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEFT RETURNED MOVED, LEFT NO ADDRESS.
